title: ctenitis lunensis
intro: Ctenitis lunensis, also known as Luned's ctenitis, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its extracts which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it beneficial for various health conditions. The health benefits of Ctenitis lunensis include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and respiratory issues. Ctenitis lunensis is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with some traditional remedies also using it in the form of a decoction or tincture.
